summary: Frontend-only regression test for MobileShowcase carousel removal. Verified: (1) phone carousel testids are completely gone, (2) MobileShowcase section still renders with kicker + title + subtitle + App Store + Play Store CTAs, (3) FR/EN language switching works correctly on the new title, (4) all other sections still present in correct order with their internal element counts intact.
critical_code_review_comments: MobileShowcase.tsx is a clean, minimal text-only CTA block (~70 lines) with no carousel logic, no useState, no PhoneFrame import. Implementation matches the user's request exactly.
Both App Store and Play Store buttons are intentionally disabled with 'cursor-not-allowed' and a 'Coming Soon / Bientôt disponible' label — correct for pre-launch state.

test_results_detail.subtitle_fr: Disponible bientôt sur iOS et Android.
test_results_detail.subtitle_en: Coming soon on iOS and Android.

context_for_next_testing_agent: MobileShowcase carousel removal verified successfully. Language switcher selectors: [data-testid=lang-button] opens menu, then [data-testid=lang-option-fr] / [data-testid=lang-option-en]. WhyBaked uses [data-testid^=why-benefit-] (NOT why-baked-benefit) and [data-testid^=why-counter-] (NOT why-baked-counter).
